description: DEPTH=12 (135M params too slow - only 200 steps)
DEPTH=10 (86M params - still too slow at 313 steps)
DEPTH=9 (81M params - too slow at 344 steps)
SwiGLU MLP (58.7M params slower - 437 steps vs 517)
HEAD_DIM=64 (8 heads - worse and slightly slower)
disable value embeddings (33.6M params - VE crucial)
constant muon momentum=0.95 (ramp from 0.85 is better)
constant weight decay=0.2 (decaying schedule is better)
cosine warmdown schedule (marginal - not better than linear)
weight decay floor=0.05 (worse than decaying to 0)
multi-scale windows SMSL S=64 M=256 L=full (worse)
value embed LR=0.5 (separate from token embed LR=1.0 worse)
MLP 3x expansion (46.1M params 600 steps - beats reproducible baseline)
ASPECT_RATIO=72 with 2x MLP (57.7M params too slow 485 steps)
DEPTH=9 with 2x MLP (66.2M params too slow 430 steps)
DEPTH=9 AR=48 with 2x MLP (48.2M params 593 steps - no improvement)
short window=seq_len//48 with 2x MLP (marginal - within noise)
TOTAL_BATCH_SIZE=2^17 with MLP 2x (1314 steps but batch too small)
DEVICE_BATCH_SIZE=32 with MLP 2x (worse quality despite similar steps)
remove cautious weight decay mask (worse - caution helps)
remove VE gate entirely (worse - learned gate helps)
VE every 4th layer (2 VE layers too few - quality loss)
VE on every layer (8 VE layers - improved quality)
MATRIX_LR=0.07 re-tuned with new arch (still worse)
MATRIX_LR=0.05 re-tuned with new arch (worse too)
shared VE across all layers (29.4M too few params)
HEAD_DIM=64 with 2x MLP + VE every layer (worse)
VE gate with bias (muon can't handle 1D bias params)
L windows=1024 (within noise - no clear improvement)
QK norm before RoPE (norm then rotate - improved)
remove QK norm entirely (much worse - norm crucial)
small non-zero c_proj init (worse - zero init better)
